name: restaurant-reviews-page
title: Reviews Page and Landing Teaser
description: Full reviews page (grid view, individual review cards with star ratings, add-review modal, filter/sort bar, ratings summary with bar-chart breakdown, image lightbox, guest feedback section) plus a landing page reviews teaser section with 10 distinct visual variants (animated-stack, classic, featured, glass-swiper, grid, image-masonry, minimal, modern, stagger-cards, scrolling-columns, testimonial). Reusable: ReviewCard, StarRating, ReviewGrid, AddReviewModal, FilterBar, RatingsSummary, ImageLightbox.

files.note: 10 landing teaser variants (animated-stack, classic, featured, glass-swiper, grid, image-masonry, minimal, modern, stagger-cards, scrolling-columns, testimonial) plus 7 full-page sub-sections (reviews-grid, review-card, add-review-modal, filter-bar, ratings-summary, guest-feedback-section, image-lightbox) are inside review-section-landing/templates/ and reviews-full/sections/ — see folder listing for all 109 files

preview.reason: Imports @/domains/shared/*, @/lib/supabase/*, @/domains/customer-facing/* which are restaurant-app-solo internals. Uses Supabase auth and tenant-specific review config. 109 TSX/TS files total — preserved as code-reference with section-level entries.
